docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OIYEMHONLAN, ETUAJIE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OIYEMHONLAN, ETUAJIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OIYEMHONLAN, ETUAJIE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JANE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JANE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OIYEMHONLAN, ETUAJIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JANE $220.77 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JANE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
